title: i go by Halos1
lyrics: I go, that's it, I just go Homie, that's not personal But your bitch suck my dick And she's my cum out of her nose She got that stain, she a ho I'm a mangy dog, I know They said, what? About who? That ain't true Not about me, cause I'm that dude I got blue pills, blue eyes Blue money, blue lies, blue Levi's And these 501's Bitch, I'm Halo's one And I'm rollin' with my clique We the shit, and we way too much to handle Don't get blown out like some candles I'm the reaper, made my bong out of a beaker I've been told that I'm a tweaker I smoke strong, you smoke weaker You roll deeper, I roll deeper And I'm shootin' from the hip Got a lip full of dip And both ears rockin' icicles Y'all still stealin' bicycles I'm buffin' at the summit I go dumb like I can't function Got my mutton in her muffin If that boy won't throw them hands We grab them clips and get to dumpin' I am peelin' off your lip Like a falcon scratchin' stiff Your whole life you been a bitch And you ain't no dog, you ain't no chick So that's embarrassing as shit That bitch got me naked and asked me to slither in Word to Draco, toting Drago's Quick to slay a Slytherin That means I'm quick to kill a Jake To snake a trick or trick a snake I left them at the bottom of the lake, of the lake I said dang man, all my homies gang bang All of us still drug slang, money up like airplanes Fiends at the back though, they chillin' on the back post Them boys are always watchin', I got options dog Mike, Vic, no nonsense and no talkin' dog That's C-shit, when I rap I'm damn near flawless And I'm just bein' honest, when I rap I'm damn near flawless Twice to make sure you got it Gettin' weight off me, it's like I'm on a diet plan Gettin' weight off me, it's lookin' like a slider hand Gettin' weight off us, like we on hydroxy Cut, my enemies still dick me I serve them L's and they happy, still smiling and laughing You can tell they gettin' lapped, got me feelin' like I'm the Flash I'm so badly in my head, can't remember the last time that I was fully fed Tried to love someone when I don't love myself, that don't help Took too many blows, that landed below the belt Way too many bitter fuckin' feelings, I have felt the damage dealt Cause I hear no, I feel low and fear no one Wastin' away the only chance I'll ever have at being young I feel dumb, I feel fried, I feel dead but I'm alive I feel foolish but I'm wise, I feel like I'm the worst kind Wasted so much of my life on a nickel that I swore was a dime What a crime, what a fuckin' waste of time

lyricsSegments.text: I go, that's it, I just go Homie, that's not personal
But your bitch suck my dick And she's my cum out of her nose
She got that stain, she a ho I'm a mangy dog, I know
They said, what?
About who?
That ain't true Not about me, cause I'm that dude
I got blue pills, blue eyes Blue money, blue lies, blue Levi's
And these 501's Bitch, I'm Halo's one
And I'm rollin' with my clique We the shit, and we way too much to handle
Don't get blown out like some candles I'm the reaper, made my bong out of a beaker
I've been told that I'm a tweaker I smoke strong, you smoke weaker
You roll deeper, I roll deeper And I'm shootin' from the hip
Got a lip full of dip And both ears rockin' icicles
Y'all still stealin' bicycles I'm buffin' at the summit
I go dumb like I can't function Got my mutton in her muffin
If that boy won't throw them hands We grab them clips and get to dumpin'
I am peelin' off your lip Like a falcon scratchin' stiff
Your whole life you been a bitch And you ain't no dog, you ain't no chick
So that's embarrassing as shit That bitch got me naked and asked me to slither in
Word to Draco, toting Drago's Quick to slay a Slytherin
That means I'm quick to kill a Jake To snake a trick or trick a snake
I left them at the bottom of the lake, of the lake
I said dang man, all my homies gang bang All of us still drug slang, money up like airplanes
Fiends at the back though, they chillin' on the back post
Them boys are always watchin', I got options dog
Mike, Vic, no nonsense and no talkin' dog
That's C-shit, when I rap I'm damn near flawless
And I'm just bein' honest, when I rap I'm damn near flawless
Twice to make sure you got it
Gettin' weight off me, it's like I'm on a diet plan
Gettin' weight off me, it's lookin' like a slider hand
Gettin' weight off us, like we on hydroxy
Cut, my enemies still dick me
I serve them L's and they happy, still smiling and laughing
You can tell they gettin' lapped, got me feelin' like I'm the Flash
I'm so badly in my head, can't remember the last time that I was fully fed
Tried to love someone when I don't love myself, that don't help
Took too many blows, that landed below the belt
Way too many bitter fuckin' feelings, I have felt the damage dealt
Cause I hear no, I feel low and fear no one
Wastin' away the only chance I'll ever have at being young
I feel dumb, I feel fried, I feel dead but I'm alive
I feel foolish but I'm wise, I feel like I'm the worst kind
Wasted so much of my life on a nickel that I swore was a dime
What a crime, what a fuckin' waste of time
